summary: Iteration 22 - Caching optimizations and Category Management features verified. All 13 backend tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend tests confirmed optimistic category switching without skeleton flash, admin panel with Tournaments tab, and Settings with Tournament Categories section.

backend: GET /api/categories returns 6 categories from pre-computed cache (< 0.5s)
GET /api/tags returns 59 tags from pre-computed cache (< 0.5s)
GET /api/admin/tournaments shows new tournament with status='paused'
POST /api/admin/categories/remove removes category from active list
PUT /api/admin/settings updates reflected within 5s (settings cache TTL)
GET /api/admin/tournaments returns all tournaments with correct fields
POST tournament status with invalid value returns 400
POST status on non-existent tournament returns 404
frontend: Leaderboard page loads without excessive skeleton flash
Category tabs visible (Robotics, Distributed Computing, Economics, Computational Physics, Biomolecules, More)
Category switching works without full skeleton flash (optimistic updates)
'More' dropdown opens for additional categories beyond 5
Admin Tournaments tab shows category tabs with Pause/Resume buttons
Active tournaments show Pause button (e.g., cs.RO)
Paused tournaments show Resume button (e.g., cs.DC)
Scheduler Status displays 'Tournament paused' for paused categories
Admin Settings tab shows 'Tournament Categories' section with 6 active
'Add category...' button present for adding new categories
Period filter buttons visible (Most Recent, This Week, This Month, All Time)

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified caching optimizations and category management. Active categories: cs.RO (active), cs.DC (paused), econ.GN (paused), physics.comp-ph (paused), q-bio.BM (paused), cs.GT (paused). Pre-computed background cache (20s TTL) serves /api/categories, /api/tags, and /api/leaderboard requests. Settings have 5s TTL cache. New categories are automatically preset to 'paused' status. Frontend does optimistic category switching without skeleton flash.
